# Single source of truth for which WPT areas the conformance suite runs and reports on.
#
# One area per line, a path relative to the wpt repo root, in canonical display order — the order
# the PR comment table (wpt.yml) and the tracker-issue table (wpt-issue.yml) render rows in. Both
# those workflows and wpt.yml's run matrix read this file, so adding a line here is all it takes to
# wire a new area into every place at once. Blank lines and `#` comments are ignored.
#
# The artifact slug for each area is derived by replacing `/` with `-` (artifact names can't contain
# `/`); there's nothing to keep in sync by hand.
#
# css/cssom, dom, domparsing, url are quick; html/dom is large and dominates wall-clock; fetch and
# service-workers are mostly network/worker-dependent (a chunk needs cross-origin or server-side
# infra the in-process runner can't provide). All exclude tentative tests (skipped by the runner).
css/cssom
dom
domparsing
html/dom
url
fetch
service-workers
